title: Run 8-cycle optimizer test for Project Intent AI
description: Run the local feedback alignment optimizer YAML as a real procedure test against a previously attempted Suco Home Improvement score. Use Project Intent AI as the test case, max_iterations=8, max_samples=200, days=90, and monitor process-level CLI output for failures and behavior coverage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: First CLI attempt created procedure 042be585-ce0e-43cf-b4e4-18a5422e84ca but warned it could not resolve scorecard 'Suco Home Improvement'. Stopped it immediately and restarting with the correct scorecard display name 'Suco - Home Improvement'.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Corrected CLI run created procedure 3142ea11-c96d-4771-97e2-295da7382978 and resolved scorecard/score, but failed during baseline before hypothesis cycles. Exact failure: Failed to run baseline recent evaluation: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'plexus'. Need rerun with a PATH that exposes the plexus console command or install the local console script.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Switching test target from Project Intent AI to Annual Income AI. Project Intent AI only had 11 feedback items; Annual Income AI has 23 recent feedback items with low alignment/accuracy and systematic false negatives, making it a better stress case for more cycles and creative-lane behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Stopped Annual Income procedure 808107ee-839f-4f49-bb28-3b892ef2133e during cycle 2 because it was launched with default num_candidates=3. That exercises normal slots and later creative, but not structural/reframe/full_rewrite lane selection. Restarting with num_candidates=6 for the actual 8-cycle lane-behavior test.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Stopped Annual Income AI procedure faf99787-2b64-455f-9471-aacd89f98da1 during cycle 7 after confirming the behaviors needed for this test. Observed normal, structural, reframe, creative, and full_rewrite slots; creative lane produced transcript-first/instruction-last, alternating reminder, and compact boundary-stress ideas; ultra-creative plateau mode triggered after six stagnant cycles. No candidate improved alignment before stop; active champion remained f98a14a2-2c8b-4278-86d1-37a235d884a5. Baseline was already strong at recent AC1 0.781 / accuracy 86.957, and only 23 feedback rows were available, so regression tracking was disabled.
